title: Hypertext markup language - Wikipédia
content: Hypertext markup language - Wikipédia Menyang kontèn Saka Wikipédia Jawa, bauwarna mardika basa Jawa HTML (HyperText Markup Language)150pxEkstensi berkas.html,.htmJenis MIMEtext/htmlType codeTEXTUniform Type Identifierpublic.htmlDikembangkan olehWorld Wide Web ConsortiumJinis formatMarkup languagePangembangan sakaStandard Generalized Markup LanguageDikembangaké dadiXHTMLStandarW3C HTML 4.01 W3C HTML 3.2 W3C HTML 5 (draft) HyperText Markup Language (HTML) iku siji basa markah kang dipigunakaké kanggo gawé kaca wèb, nampilaké manéka informasi ing sajeroning Panjelajah web Internet lan formating hypertext prasaja kang ditulis ing berkas format ASCII supaya bisa ngasilaké tampilan wujud kang kaintegerasi. Nganggo tembung liya, berkas kang digawé ing piranti alus pangolah tembung lan disimpen sajeroning format ASCII normal saéngga dadi home page kanthi préntah-préntah HTML. Sajarah standar HTML[besut | besut sumber] HTML 2.0 — (RFC 1866) kasetujoni minangka standar 22 September 1995, HTML 3.2 — 14 Januari 1996, HTML 4.0 — 18 Dhésèmber 1997, HTML 4.01 (minor fixes) — 24 Dhésèmber 1999, ISO/IEC 15445:2000 ("ISO HTML", dhedhasar saka HTML 4.01 Strict) — 15 Mèi 2000. HTML 5 isih sajeroning draft penggarapan — Januari 2008. Pranala njaba[besut | besut sumber] HTML Archived 2010-08-08 at the Wayback Machine. ASCII - ISO 8859-1 Table with HTML Entity Names Archived 2007-05-14 at the Wayback Machine. W3C's HTML Validator HTML/XHTML Validator Project on SourceForge HTML+ Discussion Document (obsolete) NCSA's Beginner's Guide to HTML Archived 2004-10-30 at the Wayback Machine. The "Head" Part of an HTML Document Archived 2010-12-28 at the Wayback Machine. How to use the title property of HTML, by JnanaBase Archived 2007-09-28 at the Wayback Machine.
